data: A lead lamina, inscribed on both sides, a third of which was lost prior to transfer to the Museum
The text is engraved from top to bottom in lines that run from right to left,
Recovered from a tomb in Marsala, but already in private hands when first recorded by Gabrici in 1941.
Partially reopened following extensive restoration work. Comprehensive collection of archaeological material, predominantly from the West of the island, with an important Etruscan collection.
Centre of Palermo, Piazza Olivella 24, 90100 - Palermo

Accademia nazionale dei Lincei, Istituto nazionale di archeologia e storia dell’arte (Italy), e Reale Accademia d’Italia, «Notizie degli scavi di antichità», Notizie degli Scavi di Antichità, 1876, http://www.worldcat.org/oclc/1646037
Lilibeo. Testimonianze archeologiche dal IV sec a.C. al V sec. d.C.
C.A. Di Stefano, Lilibeo. Testimonianze archeologiche dal IV sec a.C. al V sec. d.C. (Palermo, 1984)
Las tabellae defixionis de la Sicilia griega
M. A. López Jimeno, Las tabellae defixionis de la Sicilia griega (Amsterdam, 1991)
La Sicilia da Sesto Pompeo a Diocleziano
Giacomo Manganaro, «La Sicilia da Sesto Pompeo a Diocleziano», Aufstieg und Niedergang der romischen Welt 2.11.1 (1988): 3–89
A survey of Greek defixiones not included in the special corpora
D.R. Jordan, ‘A Survey of Greek Defixiones Not Included in the Special Corpora’, Greek, Roman and Byzantine Studies 26 (1985): 151–97
J. B. Curbera, «Defixiones», in Sicilia epigraphica. Atti del convegno internazionale Erice 15-18 Ottobre 1998. (ASNP ser.iv, quad.1), a c. di M. I. Gulletta (Pisa, 1999), 159–86
Jonathan Prag created draft from publication
Di Stefano, 1984, Lilibeo. Testimonianze archeologiche dal IV sec a.C. al V sec. d.C.
López Jimeno, 1991, Las tabellae defixionis de la Sicilia griega
Manganaro, 1988, La Sicilia da Sesto Pompeo a Diocleziano

 Line 1-23 3-7 Sicilia Lilybaeum Marsala 37.80355, 12.4379 second or first century BCE Recovered from a tomb in Marsala, but already in private hands when first recorded by Gabrici in 194137.8040442,12.4330821. No Autopsy

δεομαι σοκα το ερμη κατοχ ερμ σοι και οι πολλοι παραιτηται δε ανικονοι τηλκιε δορεν το πεμπο παδεικουμενηιμα εροτο παδεισκην καλην δορουμαι σοι καλον οτα νοετα τορακαλη πρειμα αλλεια εχον α τρειχας καλας προσο ν καλον μετοπονκαλον φρυς καλαι οφθαλμοι καλο δυο οπα ρεια δυο μυκτηρσ ομα οδοντες οταρεια τραχηλες ομοι ακροτερα κατορυσο σεισαooι μνημα ειε το επαφροδειτον αλλεια πρειμαμ τα υτης την επειστολην και το ψομ
φτηθος σθοι δυο κ ενα καρδειαν φει ο κερβερος ας πρειμας φος καλος σομ ν μηροι καλοια νημαι καλαι ακρ ιακαλα απαντα αενατη καλα αλ ειμα παραδειδο νερμης ινα αυτην σει την κυρειαδευ ειε εροτο ερμη κατε ονειε ινα αποξεις ηιμαν αλλειαν αδο ειο τη κυρει φονη κατορυσο εις
